headline: Visa’s AI Commerce And USDC Push Weighed Against Valuation Upside
summary: Visa launched Intelligent Commerce Connect, a new AI powered commerce offering that supports payments across major protocols and both Visa and non Visa cards through a single integration. The company also expanded its partnership with OwlTing’s OwlPay to enable card funded USDC acquisition and cross border digital currency transfers for consumers and enterprises. Visa, traded as NYSE:V, is rolling out these new products while its shares trade around $308.96. Over the past 3 years the stock...

headline: Visa to Announce Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 28, 2026
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 09, 2026--Visa (NYSE: V) will report its fiscal second quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. After market close, Visa will furnish the results with the Securities and Exchange Commission and post them, along with accompanying financial information, on the Visa Investor Relations website. Visa will issue a news wire alert when the earnings materials are publicly available, including a link to those documents.
